# ORVION — LLM / AI-agent entry

> ORVION is a travel CRM / operations / revenue platform (Egyptian travel agencies: flights, Umrah, Hajj, visa, hotels, tours). Backend is Supabase/PostgreSQL — SQL migrations + `app`-schema RPCs. No application UI yet.

This file is the AI-convention entry point (llmstxt.org). It is a **pointer only** — it restates nothing, so it cannot drift. Start here, then follow the single authoritative boot sequence.

## Start
1. **`README.md`** — one-hop router (what ORVION is; which authority to read for your goal).
2. **`AGENTS.md`** — how work is done. Its **§4 is the single, mandatory boot sequence** — it walks you through orientation → `GOVERNANCE.md` → `_ORVION_CANONICAL/manifest.md` (live state) → the active `changes/SPEC-*.md` or `_ORVION_CANONICAL/32_execution_roadmap.md`. Follow it; do not read the whole repo.

## The only rules you need before reading
- Where every fact lives, how decisions/documents flow, and where you may/may not write → **`GOVERNANCE.md`** (SSOT matrix §2, lifecycles §3–§4, agent write-rules §8).
- Reading mandatory repository knowledge is never owner approval; owner approval is required only where governance explicitly says so (new ADR, canon change, roadmap change, irreversible action).
- Machine-readable cold-start map (optional, auto-generated, points only): **`ai-map.json`**.
